description:
Name: Rumi Vyzovich

Proficiency: Logistics

Birth: Detritus

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: The security officer of Logistics Department "Llama". She has a strong desire to be heard and loved in a positive way because of her unnactractive flaws, opting to express this by using these unattractive flaws to become a loud and imposing heavy juggernaut in the field. Prefers to be deployed with a minigun and the heaviest armor possible, as her skillset is focused on getting close and suppressing anyone who dares close in.
